name: HARRY POTTER
description:
HARRY POTTER

this is harry in the harry potter series im dropping because i dont really like any of the other bots on here for the harry potter characters. if the image looks familiar its because i used the photo of the bot Luke Griffiths | Silver Roses by lococheese here on Janitor as reference for the bots photos in this series. a lot of her bots are really good, so go check her out.

there are two scenarios
I. Harry just won the quidditch match for griffindor. while celebrating, he sees draco run into you and knock your books out of your hand. (ANYPOV)

II. Harry saw you get totalled by draco and decided to help you out (ANYPOV)

the other bots (click the text beside the name):

Hermione

"excuse me, you're sitting in my seat."

Draco

"tch, out of my way, mudblood."

Ron

"a...a muggle?"

all 4 of them

"which house will you be in?"

tips and things to keep in mind

  • if you dont like the sceneario, thats okay! just type [OOC: do this sceneario instead] and then type the sceneario! saying [OOC:] speaks directly to the "brain" of the bot and it should drop the first sceneario completely and use yours.

  • the JLLM will speak for you. its not my bots. i do what i can to keep it from doing it but its not my fault.

  • speaking of the JLLM, thats what i test my bots with! im sure they're a lot better with proxies tho lol.

  • this is also my first series/bot im posting so any errors or anything please excuse bare with me pleaseeee

  • i use the pronoun macros when i make my bots, so if you're using your default persona (which doesnt have the option of setting pronouns) it will refer to you strictly as they/them until you tell it to do otherwise. to avoid this, use a different persona.

    thank you for using my bots bookidieeee</
creator: nattiethebaddie
